title: IIT Bombay is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IIT Bombay is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
